tagline: Israel's leading solution for syncing inventory between physical warehouses and Shopify stores. Built specifically for local ecommerce merchants.

hero.title: Your inventory doesn't lie.
hero.subtitle: Real-time inventory sync between your physical warehouse and your Shopify store. Built for the Israeli market, with a built-in barcode scanner mobile app.

pain.title: Manual inventory management costs you customers
pain.subtitle: When your warehouse isn't synced with your store, everyone loses.
pain.oversellBody: Customers buy products that are already out of stock. The result: cancelled orders, refunds, and negative reviews that hurt your brand.
pain.manualBody: Warehouse staff waste hours updating Excel sheets instead of packing orders. Typos are only a matter of time.
pain.blindBody: Customer service sees one number in Shopify while the warehouse team sees another. Desync leads to chaos.

how.title: Three steps to peace of mind
how.subtitle: Here's how SyncStock IL turns your warehouse into a well-oiled machine.
how.step1Body: Warehouse staff scan incoming or outgoing products using the mobile app or a dedicated scanner.
how.step2Body: Data streams in real time to SyncStock servers and is matched against Shopify product IDs.
how.step3Body: Store inventory updates automatically. No more overselling, everything is transparent and accurate.

pricing.title: Pricing that fits any store
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade as you grow. No commitment.

cta.title: Ready to stop entering inventory manually?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Israeli Shopify stores already enjoying a synced, accurate, efficient warehouse.
cta.button: Install now from the App Store
